backend/main.mo: Defines an empty Motoko actor with no methods.
feature_evidence.json: Lists feature change records referencing frontend files affected by location/address removal updates.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries for all frontend files describing their roles in the site.
frontend/index.css: Defines global Tailwind-based styles and OKLCH color tokens for light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point configuring metadata, SEO tags, fonts, and loading the main script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing all site sections with header and footer.
frontend/src/components/Section.tsx: Reusable layout wrapper providing section spacing, titles, and containers.
frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx: Footer with company details, emails, GSTIN, legal info, and attribution bar.
frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx: Sticky responsive header with logo, navigation links, and mobile menu.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook creating and managing authenticated or anonymous backend actors with react-query.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing identity state, login, logout, and status handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file exporting nothing because no backend queries are used.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and custom CSS variables for a light/dark red‑white theme.
frontend/src/lib/publicAsset.ts: Utility that returns a normalized public asset path for dev and production builds.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React rendering with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/sections/AboutSection.tsx: Renders an About section with company details, highlight cards, and descriptive content.
frontend/src/sections/ContactSection.tsx: Renders a Contact section showing email and legal info plus a call‑to‑action card.
frontend/src/sections/GallerySection.tsx: Displays a facility image gallery with fallback handling and a lightbox modal.
frontend/src/sections/HeroSection.tsx: Renders the homepage hero with branding, tagline, and smooth‑scroll CTA buttons.
frontend/src/sections/ServicesSection.ts: React component rendering a services grid with cards and a call-to-action, listing manufacturing and material offerings.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme colors, fonts, animations, and enabling plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the website's goals, requirements, theme, business details, and known issues such as image loading failures.
